channel.title: Dimension 20
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20 on Dropout.tv

item.title: Dimension 20: Cloudward, Ho! Trailer
item.description:
Join the crew of the Zephyr as they embark for adventure, solve mysteries, and explore new worlds. Premieres June 4th.

Duration: 02:07

Tags: Dimension 20, Cloudward Ho!, dungeons and dragons, tabletop rpg, steampunk, victorian era, jules verne, sci-fi, adventures, retro tech, mysteries, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Hope and Heroism
item.description:
The Righteous Wrestlers clash in the final match for the seat on Olympus.

Duration: 2:10:49

Tags: Dimension 20, Titan Takedown, dungeons and dragons, role playing, RPG, tabletop rpg, bloodsport, hercules, mythology, magic, the gods, mythical creatures, royalty, heroes, wrestling, partying, over the top, xavier woods, austin creed, kofi kingston, bayley, chelsea green, brennan lee mulligan
